description: Letter from the Qaraite community of Damascus to the Qaraite community of Cairo. Dated: Wednesday, 10 Tammuz 5512 AM (ואתה על), which is 1752 CE. But it is catalogued as 1776 CE. Written in Hebrew and Judaeo-Arabic. This very large document needs further examination. Apparently this also has the shelfmark Yevr.-Arab. II 1477.
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic מדמשק לקהיר. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
